name: workflow closed-loop step architect-to-adr generates one ADR per architectural decision
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step architect-to-adr --decisions-stub d1 --adr-out docs/adr --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f docs/adr/0001-d1.md ] && echo ok 1>&2
